name: Question
about: A question that the docs did not answer
title: "[question] "
labels: question

---

## What you tried first

- [ ] Read [Quickstart](../../docs/QUICKSTART.md)
- [ ] Read [FAQ](../../docs/FAQ.md)
- [ ] Read [Architecture](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] Read [Glossary](../../docs/GLOSSARY.md)
- [ ] Searched existing issues

## The question

One clear question per issue.

## Context

Skill you were running, runtime, compartment completeness, creator stage.

## What the docs say, and what is unclear

Quote the relevant doc passage (with file:line) and explain what is ambiguous.

## Suggested docs fix

If the docs should be updated to answer this, propose the edit.
